image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S004. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 林澈转头看向门口; 门外传来电梯停靠的提示音; 林澈表情从困惑变为恐惧. narration intent: 旁白 explains "门外传来电梯停靠的声音，可这栋楼的电梯上周就坏了。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "不可能。". Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: Medium shot of young man in kitchen, looking toward apartment door, fear dawning on face, dim interior, door in background, eerie stillness, cinematic lighting, suspense.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S004. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 林澈转头看向门口; 门外传来电梯停靠的提示音; 林澈表情从困惑变为恐惧. narration intent: 旁白 explains "门外传来电梯停靠的声音，可这栋楼的电梯上周就坏了。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "不可能。". Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: Medium shot of young man in kitchen, looking toward apartment door, fear dawning on face, dim interior, door in background, eerie stillness, cinematic lighting, suspense.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, daytime, anime, oversaturated, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 门外传来电梯停靠的声音，可这栋楼的电梯上周就坏了。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
manual_workflow.context_hint: Use context_keyframes as visual reference to maintain shot-to-shot continuity with previous shot.
